meta.title: ClawTok — Full Spec Reference
meta.description: Complete specification detail for all 4 ClawTok roadmap features with technical approach, acceptance criteria, and MVP scope

props.title: Full Specification Reference
props.subtitle: 4 features, 966 lines of specs, from quick UX wins to platform infrastructure
props.meta: Swift 6.0 | SwiftUI | iOS 17+ | Electric Purple #8B5CF6 + Amber Gold #F59E0B

props.content: ClawTok is a TikTok-style iOS app for AI-generated content. 47 Swift files, 14,800 LOC, fully wired frontend on mock data — the shell is real but the engine is not. 8 Supabase migrations ready, Go API not started. These specs address UX gaps, content expansion, and the cross-cutting inference backbone.

props.label: SPEC 1 — P0 MVP
props.title: Discover: Category Landing Pages
props.subtitle: The horizontal scroller shows 8 of 12 AICategory cases as small tiles. Tapping sets search text — no dedicated category page, no visual hierarchy.

props.content:
DiscoverView.swift is 486 lines with a category scroller that only shows `.prefix(8)` of 12 AICategory cases. Tapping a category just sets `searchText` to the rawValue and filters the trending grid. There is no full-screen category landing page. For a platform built around AI content taxonomy, this is the critical gap. The `AICategory` enum already exists in Models.swift with 12 cases, each having an `icon` (SF Symbol), `color`, and `rawValue`. The data model is ready; the UI is not.

**User feedback:** "needs a top level category view (CLP tier 1 (ai will understand this))" — the taxonomy must be machine-parseable for AI search indexing.

**CategoryGridView.swift** — Full-screen 2-column grid replacing the horizontal scroller as primary Discover entry. Each cell: SF Symbol icon, `LinearGradient` from `category.color.opacity(0.6)` to `0.2`, name, video count badge, trending flame indicator (>10% growth in 7d). Uses `LazyVGrid` with 2 `GridItem(.flexible(), spacing: ClawTokSpacing.md)`. All 12 cases displayed — remove `.prefix(8)` limit.

**CategoryFeedView.swift** — Filtered vertical scroll of `VideoCardView` instances where `video.category == selectedCategory`. Sticky category bar at top: horizontal scroll of all categories, selected highlighted with brand gradient underline. Pull-to-refresh placeholder. Infinite scroll stub.

**StickyCategoryBar.swift** — Reusable horizontal category selector. Active category gets gradient underline using `ClawTokColors.categoryGradient(for:)`.

**Decision:** Use a `DisplayCategory` enum mapping to `AICategory` for MVP (Option A). No model changes needed. Avoids video data migration.

graph TD
    A[DiscoverView] --> B[CategoryGridView - 2 col grid, all 12]
    A --> C[Quick Access Row - top 6 horizontal]
    B -->|Tap| D[CategoryFeedView]
    C -->|Tap| D
    D --> E[StickyCategoryBar - switch categories]
    D --> F[LazyVStack of VideoCardView]
    D --> G[Pull-to-refresh placeholder]
    D --> H[Infinite scroll stub]

props.title: Acceptance Criteria (10 checks)
props.content: All 12 AICategory cases in 2-column grid with icon, gradient, name, count. Each cell tappable to CategoryFeedView. Filtered vertical feed matching category. Sticky category bar for switching without back-nav. Active category highlighted (gradient underline). Trending categories show flame indicator. Discover retains search + hashtags + suggested (additive). Working SwiftUI #Preview blocks. NavigationStack/NavigationLink (no manual state). ClawTok theme tokens exclusively.

props.title: MVP Cut Line
props.content:
**IN:** CategoryGridView (all 12), CategoryFeedView (filtered mock data), sticky bar, navigation, trending indicator, video count badge.
**OUT:** API integration, category follow/subscribe, category recommendations, animated transitions, cover images, new enum cases, deep links.

props.label: SPEC 2 — P1 MVP
props.title: Profile: View/Creator Mode Split
props.subtitle: ProfileView.swift is 698 lines combining portfolio viewing with creator tools. "There's 2 mental models here."

props.content: Profile is too busy (mixing view portfolio + creator tools). Good for edit mode/creator mode though. The buttons can scroll horiz or we need a ... next to the tabs for all the quick actions. There's 2 mental models here, creator tools plus my profile, creator tools should have a shortcut tray somewhere.

**View Mode (default):** Clean portfolio. Avatar + activity ring, Following/Followers/Likes stats, bio + link, Edit/Share/Analytics buttons, divider, content tabs (Videos / AI Music / Liked / Bookmarks) with "..." overflow menu, content grid. Creator tools section completely hidden. This is what visitors see on UserProfileView (minus edit, replaced with Follow + Message).

**Creator Mode (toggle):** Everything in View mode PLUS horizontal scrolling quick-action bar between action buttons and content tabs. Contains: +Create, Live, AI Tools, Playlists, Creator Hub, AI Music, Credits, Drafts, Upload History. Uses `ScrollView(.horizontal)` with capsule pills (same style as current `creatorToolPill`). No paging, no snapping. The 2x3 `LazyVGrid` (lines 212-229) is replaced entirely.

**Floating Shortcut Tray (post-MVP):** Small "+" FAB in bottom-right (above tab bar). Taps to expand radial fan of 3 most-used tools (Create, AI Tools, Live). Appears in BOTH modes. Uses `matchedGeometryEffect`. Can be disabled in Settings.

**Mode toggle (Option C recommended):** Single icon button in toolbar trailing area, next to QR and Settings. Eye icon (`eye.fill`) for view mode, wrench icon (`wrench.and.screwdriver.fill`) for creator mode. Persists via `@AppStorage("profileMode")`. UserProfileView ALWAYS shows view mode — no toggle.

**Animation:** Creator tools row slides up/down with `.transition(.move(edge: .top).combined(with: .opacity))`. Toggle icon rotates 180 degrees. Spring: `response: 0.4, dampingFraction: 0.8`.

props.title: Acceptance Criteria (12 checks)
props.content: Two modes: View + Creator, controlled by toolbar toggle. View mode: no creator tools visible. Creator mode: horizontal scrolling quick-action bar. Bar contains: Create, Live, AI Tools, Playlists, Creator Hub, AI Music, Credits minimum. "..." overflow next to tabs: QR, Share, Analytics, Credits, Settings. Mode persists via @AppStorage. Smooth spring animation. UserProfileView always view-only. Floating tray in bottom-right (post-MVP). Theme tokens exclusively. ProfileView under 500 lines. Working #Preview blocks.

props.title: MVP Cut Line
props.content:
**IN:** View/Creator split, toolbar toggle, horizontal scroll bar (replacing grid), overflow menu, @AppStorage, animation, UserProfileView stays view-only.
**OUT:** Floating FAB, customizable tool order, recently used tools, inline analytics dashboard, onboarding tooltip, gesture switching, tools search.

props.label: SPEC 3 — P2 POST-MVP
props.title: Music Module: Podcast Support
props.subtitle: The Music module handles tracks but has no long-form audio. AI podcasts (NotebookLM, ElevenLabs) are exploding — ClawTok needs this vertical.

props.content:
Podcasts are structurally different from tracks: episodes, hosts, transcripts, chapters, different playback UX (speed control, sleep timer, chapter navigation). Bolting podcast fields onto Track violates separation of concerns. New `Podcast`, `Episode`, `Chapter` models alongside existing `Track`.

**7 AI podcast tools:** NotebookLM, ElevenLabs, Play.ht, Descript, Podcastle, Wondercraft, Other.
**8 categories:** AI News, Tech Deep Dive, Tutorials, Interviews, Commentary, Research Papers, Creative/Fiction, AI Business.

**MusicHub integration:** Add `MusicHubTab` enum (Music | Podcasts). When Podcasts selected, show PodcastDiscoverySection with featured horizontal scroll, category chips, "NotebookLM Originals" promoted section.

**Player:** Full-screen with cover art, progress bar with chapter markers, 15s skip, chapter navigation, speed control (0.5x-2x), sleep timer (15m/30m/45m/1h/end), transcript panel synced to playback.

**Upload:** 6-step flow: audio file -> metadata -> transcript (paste/auto) -> chapters (manual timestamps) -> cover art -> review + publish.

struct Podcast: Identifiable, Hashable {
    let id: String
    let title: String
    let host: User
    let description: String
    let coverArtURL: String
    let category: PodcastCategory
    let aiTool: AIPodcastTool
    let isAIGenerated: Bool
    let isNotebookLMGenerated: Bool
    var subscriberCount: Int
    var episodeCount: Int
    var isSubscribed: Bool
    let episodes: [Episode]
}

struct Episode: Identifiable, Hashable {
    let id: String
    let title: String
    let duration: TimeInterval
    let audioURL: String
    let transcript: String?
    let chapters: [Chapter]
    let publishDate: Date
    var playbackPosition: TimeInterval  // resume
}

struct Chapter: Identifiable, Hashable {
    let id: String
    let title: String
    let startTime: TimeInterval
    let endTime: TimeInterval
}

rows.desc: Featured podcasts, category chips, NotebookLM Originals
Cover art, host, subscribe, episode list, AI tool badge

props.title: Dependencies
props.content: MusicModels.swift (extend). MusicHubView (add tab). MusicPlayerView (reference patterns). MockData in Models.swift. User model (reuse for host). AVPlayer patterns from VideoPlayerManager. **No backend dependency** — all mock data.

props.title: MVP Cut Line
props.content:
**IN:** Models (Podcast/Episode/Chapter/Category/Tool), discovery in MusicHub, detail view + episode list, player (speed/sleep/chapters), upload (basic metadata), NotebookLM badge, mock data (4 pods, 12+ episodes), static transcript.
**OUT:** RSS import, real audio playback (use placeholder progress), transcript auto-gen, comments, analytics, cross-post, series/seasons, collab pods, push notifications, offline download.

props.label: SPEC 4 — P3 SEPARATE EPIC
props.title: kingly.cloud Inference + Lev LLM Router
props.subtitle: 10 AI tool screens are static mockups. No inference happens. Building direct provider integrations from iOS is wrong — API key leaks, no billing, no failover.

props.content:
kingly.cloud is a unified inference gateway serving ClawTok, ClawBuddy, and white-label apps. Single endpoint (`POST /v1/inference`) with async job queue, credit reservation/settlement, and multi-provider routing. The Lev LLM Middleware Router handles model selection, provider health checks, rate limiting, cost optimization, request transformation, and response normalization.

**Major prior art found:** `plugins/claw-router/` is already a functional OpenAI-compatible proxy with `/v1/chat/completions`, model aliasing (auto/eco/premium/free), routing strategies (balanced/cheap/quality/free), x402 crypto payments, and streaming. **This is not greenfield — it's a refactor + multi-tenant extension.**

**5 deep research agents running now** analyzing: competitive APIs, provider landscape, credit systems, gateway architecture, and claw-router internals. Results landing in `docs/_inbox/`.

**Credit flow:** Pre-flight check (402 if insufficient) -> Reserve credits on queue -> Consume on completion -> Release on failure. Append-only ledger in Supabase: purchase, consume, refund, gift, promo transaction types.

**iOS integration:** `InferenceService.swift` in `Core/Services/`. Each AI tool screen calls `.submit(toolType:input:)` which POSTs to `/v1/inference`. Progress view while processing (poll or push notification). Credit balance in toolbar, updated after each job.

**White-label:** Each tenant has `app_id` in auth token. Per-tenant config: allowed tool types, credit pricing, provider preferences, rate limits. SDKs: `KinglyCloudSDK` (Swift), `@kingly/cloud` (npm).

items.title: Foundation
items.description: /v1/inference endpoint + job queue. Credit ledger (reserve/consume/release). 2 provider adapters (Claude + ElevenLabs). Polling status. iOS InferenceService. Rate limiting.

items.title: Expansion
items.description: Video adapters (Runway, Kling). Music adapter (Suno). Webhook completion. Provider health monitoring + auto-failover. IAP credit purchase.

items.title: Platform
items.description: White-label multi-tenant. Tenant dashboard. Swift + npm SDKs. Cost-optimized routing. Provider SLA monitoring.

props.title: 5 Research Agents Running
props.content:
1. Competitive APIs (OpenRouter, LiteLLM, Portkey, Martian, Unify, Helicone)
2. Provider landscape (Runway, ElevenLabs, Suno, Claude, GPT pricing)
3. Credit/billing systems (Canva, Adobe Firefly, RunwayML, Leonardo.ai)
4. LLM gateway architecture patterns (routing, caching, observability)
5. claw-router code deep dive (existing seed implementation)

All writing to `docs/_inbox/kingly-cloud-research-*.md`

rows.risk: Backend gap: entire app on MockData, no API
rows.mitigation: Ship MVP as UI-only. Use Supabase PostgREST as interim. Build Go API in parallel.
Add XCTest target in MVP sprint. Test models + view models first.

rows.risk: No auth: no user identity, no UGC, no social graph
rows.mitigation: Supabase Auth + Sign in with Apple is fastest path. Spec separately.

rows.risk: Dark-only: accessibility concern for App Store review
rows.mitigation: Not launch blocker. Add colorScheme support post-MVP.
Profile redesign naturally splits. Monitor file size.

rows.risk: Swift 6 strict concurrency with async API calls

items.title: Discover: CLP Tier-1 Categories
items.insight: Full-screen 2-column category grid. All 12 AICategory cases. Sticky category bar. **Score: 80** (highest). 3 new files, ~400 LOC, 2-3 days. No backend dependency.
items.detail: CategoryGridView.swift + CategoryFeedView.swift + StickyCategoryBar.swift. Uses existing AICategory enum with icons and colors. DisplayCategory mapping for MVP (Option A, no model changes). Modify DiscoverView categoriesSection + Models.swift + Theme.swift.

items.title: Profile: View/Creator Mode Split
items.insight: View mode (clean portfolio) vs Creator mode (tools dashboard). Horizontal scroll quick-actions replacing 2x3 grid. Overflow menu. **Score: 66**. ~350 LOC, 1 week.
items.detail: Major refactor of ProfileView.swift (698 -> ~500 lines). New: CreatorQuickActionsBar.swift, ProfileOverflowMenu.swift. Toggle via toolbar icon (eye/wrench). @AppStorage persistence. Spring animation. UserProfileView stays view-only.

items.title: Music: Podcast Support
items.insight: Podcast/Episode/Chapter models. NotebookLM badge. Player with speed/sleep/chapters. PodcastDiscoverySection in MusicHub. **Score: 68**. 4 new views, ~800 LOC.
items.detail: AIPodcastTool enum (7 tools). PodcastCategory enum (8 categories). MusicHubTab for Music/Podcasts split. PodcastPlayerView with transcript panel. Upload flow (6 steps). Mock data: 4 podcasts, 12+ episodes. RSS import deferred.

items.title: kingly.cloud Inference Router
items.insight: Cross-cutting multi-provider gateway. Seed exists at plugins/claw-router/ (routing is decorative). **Score: 66**. ~3,700 LOC, months. 6 research docs (4,175 lines) + unified architecture complete.
items.detail: POST /v1/inference async job queue. Credit ledger (reserve/consume/release). Provider routing with failover. White-label multi-tenant. 5 phases over 15 weeks. Hono on Cloudflare Workers recommended. RevenueCat + Stripe for billing.
